description: VERIFIED LIVE: SegmentFault (思否) via content-script DOM extraction — no login, no API key. Question links use the /q/ path with the title as link text. Navigate the tab to segmentfault.com (home, a tag, or search) and call the tool. Tested live by Claude Code: 60 question links — title + url extracted correctly.

tools.name: segmentfault_questions
tools.description: Question links on the current SegmentFault page (home, a tag, or search). Navigate the tab there first. Returns each question's title and url (/q/<id>). VERIFIED.

tools.name: segmentfault_articles
tools.description: Article links on the current SegmentFault page (/a/<id>). Navigate the tab to a feed/tag first. Returns each article's title and url.
